message.content:
Forge is treating this as a [api] [react] based on your prompt. Generating plan...

<think>
I will create the 24 files as requested, following Next.js 14 App Router conventions, TypeScript best practices, and the specific requirements for authentication and restaurant management.

Step 1: Configuration and Dependencies
- package.json
- tsconfig.json
- next.config.js
- .env.example

Step 2: Database and Auth Utilities
- prisma/schema.prisma
- src/lib/prisma.ts
- src/lib/auth.ts

Step 3: Core Layout and Styles
- src/app/layout.tsx
- src/app/globals.css
- src/components/Navbar.tsx

Step 4: API Routes
- src/app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts
- src/app/api/restaurants/route.ts
- src/app/api/menu/route.ts
- src/app/api/orders/route.ts

Step 5: Components
- src/components/RestaurantCard.tsx
- src/components/MenuItemForm.tsx
- src/components/OrderTable.tsx

Step 6: Pages
- src/app/page.tsx (Landing)
- src/app/auth/login/page.tsx
- src/app/auth/register/page.tsx
- src/app/dashboard/page.tsx
- src/app/menu/page.tsx
- src/app/orders/page.tsx

Step 7: Middleware
- src/middleware.ts

I'll start with the configuration files.
</think>

{"file_text": "{
  "name": "restaurant-management-app",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "private": true,
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "next dev",
    "build": "next build",
    "start": "next start",
    "lint": "next lint",
    "postinstall": "prisma generate"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "@next-auth/prisma-adapter": "^1.0.7",
    "@prisma/client": "^5.10.2",
    "bcryptjs": "^2.4.3",
    "next": "14.1.0",
    "next-auth": "^4.24.6",
    "react": "^18.2.0",
    "react-dom": "^18.2.0",
    "zod": "^3.22.4"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@types/bcryptjs": "^2.4.6",
    "@types/node": "^20.11.20",
    "@types/react": "^18.2.58",
    "@types/react-dom": "^18.2.19",
    "autoprefixer": "^10.4.17",
    "postcss": "^8.4.35",
    "prisma": "^5.10.2",
    "tailwindcss": "^3.4.1",
    "typescript": "^5.3.3"
  }
}
", "path": "/workspace/package.json", "command": "create"}
